answers: Weight loss = calories in < calories out. Track food, eat more protein and vegetables, reduce processed foods and sugary drinks.
Tips: eat slowly, drink water before meals, get 7+ hours sleep, strength train to build muscle, and be patient.
Best approach: sustainable calorie deficit (300-500 cal/day), high protein diet, regular exercise, and consistency over months.
Ojon komano tips: bhat komao, protein beshhi khao, mishti ar processed food kam khao, niyomito exercise koro.
